Are these teams alright? I’m still pretty new to the game

2 of the waves this dtide are cheesable, so you can do something like this

- w1a5: sorel agrippa leigh celeste, aurita casiah liz daffodil

- w3a5: uvhash ogier nautila + whale doresain support

Then the remaining waves can be something like this

- w4a5: castor pollux jenkin winkle

- w2a3: gmurphy murphy miryam nymphaea, tawil karen ramona caecus

- w5a3: mouchette thais aigis faint

1st team is like 2 teams mashed together, mouchette doesnt play well with gmurphy, and life drain is team unique so the 2nd copy is doing nothing. Pick either gmurphy or mouchette and build the team around them

2nd team is fine, but kath is normally built more defensively with will unyielding and either paradox or feast from afar as the covenant. This is a very glass cannon kath in a team that has no defense, it will be awful in long fights. And again, 2 life drains are redundant
Thank you!! Could I have some help with teams please? I’m really confused.
what do u find confusing
Who works together and who doesn’t, id like to make a team for gmurpghy and kath and mouchette. Im just not sure who works with them.
These are my characters
Also this is really help I really appreciate it
Helpful*
Or if there are any better teams you recommend

Gmurphy (as dps): glass cannon burst dps that relies on dealing massive damage with her exalt and waltz which is amplified by sacrifice. Good teammates give her aliemus for exalt, copy her waltzes, or are lemurians to activate her passive (in arc 2). Examples: miryam, thais, tulu

Kath: Slow tanky dps that ramps up damage over time by playing fiamma cards and stacking combust. Good teammates help to draw kath cards, generate arithmetica, reduce cost of kath cards. Examples: gramona, karen, tinct

Mouchette: glass cannon dps that relies on chaining long combos of strikes to trigger pursuit many times. Good teammates buff strikes, copy cards, add defensive support which mouchette lacks. Examples: helot, thais, lily
all also benefit from generic support like vuln, weakness, keyflare
so when building a team you are really choosing a dps and then ticking off a checklist of things they need to shine

also worth noting since you're a new player, don't feel too pressured to get dupes on characters during a banner if you already own the character. you can get a material that gives you a dupe for any character you want once a month without spending money, so you can always use those over time even if you are a dupe short of where you want a character to be when the banner ends
